summary: A stunning Peggy‑O captured on an improved matrix mix – clear, pretty sound and a gorgeous Jerry performance.
review: These reviews rave about the Peggy‑O from this show, calling it possibly the prettiest ever heard and even moving listeners to tears. The matrix source (Rob’s audience recording mixed with the soundboard) is praised for its noticeable improvement and overall pleasant clarity, though no dedicated soundboard exists for this segment.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers give high marks (4‑5 stars) and consistently highlight an exceptional Peggy‑O performance plus a noticeably improved matrix recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is described as a 'nice improvement' with clear, pretty audio; no dedicated soundboard (SBD) exists for this portion of the show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviews focus on the early part of the set (first HSF and Peggy‑O), noting a beautiful, slow rendition that stands out as a highlight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for delivering possibly the prettiest Peggy‑O ever performed.
